description: Golden-file-backed integration tests for `treb run` and `treb register` commands using live Anvil nodes, with forge output normalizers for stable golden file comparisons and registry artifact verification.

userStories.title: Forge Output Normalizers for Golden Pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want normalizers for non-deterministic forge compiler and execution output so that golden files are stable across environments and foundry version updates.
acceptanceCriteria: CompilerOutputNormalizer normalizes solc compilation progress lines (e.g., 'Compiling N files with solc X.Y.Z' → 'Compiling <N> files with solc <SOLC_VERSION>')
GasNormalizer normalizes gas values in output (e.g., 'gas: 12345' → 'gas: <GAS>')
BlockNumberNormalizer normalizes block numbers in output (e.g., 'block: 1' → 'block: <BLOCK>')
Each normalizer has at least 2 unit tests (match case and no-match case)
New normalizers are NOT added to default chain — used as extras only
Existing normalizer unit tests still pass
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Run Command Golden File Tests — Basic Deployment and Dry-Run
Run Command Golden File Tests — Debug and Error Paths
